name: LMK Group AB (publ)
summary: LMK Group AB (publ) engages in supplying and delivering meal kits to the household's front door in the Nordic region. It operates in Sweden, Norway, and Denmark under the Linas Matkasse, Godtlevert, Adams Matkasse, and RetNemt brands. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Sp√É¬•nga, Sweden.
